name: Pupot
description: Developer of an online gift card platform designed to offer a range of top-ups and mobile recharges. The company's platform offers bill payments, digital gift cards, mobile refills, and networking services from various vendors that can be bought using Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies, enabling people to live on cryptocurrency as easily as possible, with no bank or exchange account required.

name: BorrowMyDoggy
description: Provider of pet sitter services designed to connect pet owners with local dog borrowers for walks, weekends, and holidays. The company helps to link pet owners with local sitters for walks, home boarding, and holiday care, enabling dog owners to give dogs more exercise and playtime and allowing people without a pet to spend quality time with one.

name: CandyClub
description: Candy Club Holdings Ltd is engaged in two components namely the B2C business and B2B business. Under the B2C business, the company sells subscriptions plans for the Candy Boxes in the USA, and the B2B business involves the selling of Candy Club Branded Confectionery to specialty market resellers in the USA. It has one segment, which is administration services in Australia.

name: CareGuide
description: Operator of an online care provider marketplace intended to match families with care providers through a portfolio of websites. The company's marketplace offers senior care, child care, pet care and home care services, enabling customers to find local care providers, including nannies, babysitters, pet sitters, elder-care providers and house sitters.

name: Charlie
description: Developer of an HR management and automation platform designed to provide instant access to essential information. The company's platform automates a lot of the administrative headaches that accompany a growing business, from onboarding new employees to tracking time off and sick days, enabling businesses to streamline their operations and manage them efficiently.

name: Click Mechanic
description: Developer of an online car-repair marketplace intended to connect with car owners and mobile mechanics and provide car-related services. The company's marketplace features a customized portal for repairing and servicing the clutch, water pumps, and brake pads among the other car parts, enabling car owners to get their cars repaired and serviced in an easy way without the need to go to a car repair shop.

name: Digits
description: Developer of a messaging and engagement platform designed to connect global brands, sports teams, public figures, artists, entertainment partners, and small businesses directly to the audiences. The company's platform facilitates communication between leaders and members without conflicting commercial interests, toxicity, and data privacy issues of social media, enabling influencers to interact with their audience as individuals freely.

name: DraftPilot.ai
description: Legal AI company that enables lawyers to create mark-ups of contracts in minutes instead of hours.

name: Dusk
description: Operator of a nightlife platform designed to offer exclusive offers, access, and free drinks. The company's platform permits users to find their nearest bar and show the screen to the bartender to get free drinks and exclusive discounts, enabling them to save money while enjoying too and partner venues to increase their revenues through unique offers.

name: Flic
description: Developer of a wireless smart button intended to trigger applications, services, and mobile devices. The company's device is a physical shortcut that wirelessly connects to phones, tablets, or computers for the pre-configuring tasks on the user's phone, enabling users to access devices without moving from one place to another.

name: Dulcetta
description: Developer of a music streaming platform intended to offer scientifically engineered music to increase focus and reduce distractions. The company's platform uses phase sequenced instrumental music to increase the attention span when working, studying, writing, and reading, enabling users to concentrate on their work by listening to music and thus improving their productivity.

name: GreenQ
description: Developer of a waste management technology designed to offer connected garbage collection for municipalities. The company's technology uses a hardware-enabled garbage waste tracking device that is installed on all garbage trucks which collects real-time data on the waste pickup process, without any need for manual activation, enabling garbage collection vendors, system integrators, and municipalities to weigh incoming waste and predict the garbage production rate as well as reduce expenses and emissions while also providing improved services to their citizens.

name: Hey
description: Provider of catering, cooking, and food delivery services intended to offer a marketplace for connecting chefs with the people. The company's services help in organizing delicious food for people seeking tailored catering services for any event or party, enabling people to connect with caterers, food trucks, and private chefs to get their desired food and place bulk orders from their preferred vendors.

name: Houst
description: Developer of a homestay management platform designed to make listing a hassle-free process. The company's platform automates substantial parts of the property letting, price optimizations, marketing, and management aspects of guest bookings made on notable travel websites, enabling homeowners to achieve the optimal blend of rental yield and stress-free customer service by making more money.

name: Hubble
description: Operator of an online marketplace created to match companies requiring flexible office space with landlords and commercial space providers. The company's marketplace helps businesses rent, manage and share office space, enabling clients to search, curate, and rent office spaces in London, helping them find the right balance of office and remote working, so their teams can thrive.

name: Kairos AR
description: Developer of a face recognition tool designed to find, analyze and understand facial expressions. The company's tool uses artificial intelligence and facial recognition technology through computer vision and machine learning to recognize faces in videos, photos, and in the real world, enabling organizations to transform the way they interact with people along with control of data, security, and privacy.

name: LeaseLock
description: Developer of financial technology software designed to deposit replacement for real estate. The company's platform leverages artificial intelligence to optimize coverage based on property history, seamless integration within the native online leasing checkout results in industry-leading adoption rates, significant conversion lift, and drastically reduced deposit administration and risk, enabling apartment operators to reduce bad debt in a faster, simpler, more affordable rental transaction, and an improved resident experience while generating coverage for the property on every lease.

name: Luxe Nomad
description: Operator of a booking portal and management company intended to help tourists in booking hotels and villas at their destinations. The company's platform offers a list of luxurious hotels and villas in different places all over the world, enabling tourists to find comfortable and cheap resting places for their vacations or official tours.

name: Movivo
description: Developer of a mobile application intended to cover the cost of mobile minutes. The company's mobile application lets users cover the cost of their mobile minutes and earn free mobile data by completing crowdsourced tasks, and surveys and by downloading new mobile applications, enabling users to discover new mobile content and earn free airtime to top up a mobile phone.

name: mxHero
description: Developer of a cloud storage platform designed to automatically file messages, attachments, and documents in one place for free access and control. The company's platform feasibly integrates with email and cloud storage, securely shares important emails with team members, and automatically captures email conversations to the cloud folders with meta-data, enabling users to drag and drop email messages directly into their cloud storage folders without leaving outlook.

name: OFI
description: Operator of a managed services firm focused on digital transformation in automation services. The company offers a plethora of services, such as public cloud management, data center services, process automation, and development, and helps customers try new concepts and improve current return on investment to benefit from expertise at competitive pricing, thereby enabling clients to reach their potential through technological solutions that are suitable for their needs.

name: PaceMaker
description: Developer of a music mixing tool designed to help mix music using artificial intelligence. The company's artificial intelligence technology based application, enables users to create and monetize DJ mixes using licensed streams from Spotify and other music stream apps.

name: Pop.in
description: Developer of an online gaming platform designed to empower human connection through the gaming experience. The company's platform offers users to play live games, discover new people or collaborate and play without leaving home, enabling people to socialize in an intimate setting or larger group setting with others globally.

name: Junomedical
description: Developer of a digital medical platform intended to connect patients with the doctors easily. The company's platform allows users to search for desired treatment and browse through the hospitals offering the procedure by country, enabling patients to get full information about procedures, doctors, hospitals, pricing, and destinations.

name: Sampler
description: Provider of self-serve digital product sampling services intended to make it targeted, measurable, and turnkey. The company's services include capturing demographic and behavioral insights on every product sample with easy-to-read results, enabling businesses to understand the consumer analytics and preferences behind the product.

name: SimplyCook
description: Provider of a subscription-based service designed to make cooking new meals accessible for all. The company's subscription-based service offers new concept recipe kits containing recipe cards and natural ingredient blends with culinary taste ingredients, enabling its members to expand their meal repertoire with ease.

name: Talkable
description: Developer of a referral program software intended to help brands acquire new customers with endorsements from current customers. The company's software identifies, targets, and rewards valuable customers through in-depth data analysis and offers A/B testing and ongoing campaign optimization, enabling users to create and optimize offers with pre-defined templates and to increase sales.

name: Thriva
description: Provider of preventative healthcare services intended to empower people to proactively manage their health. The company's services offer subscription-based insights to monitor and track cholesterol levels, vitamin-D deficiency, iron deficiency, and poor liver function, enabling customers to access affordable, clinical-grade information that reveals how their lifestyle is impacting their well-being.

name: The Ticket Fairy
description: Ticket Fairy is Salesforce meets Eventbrite - AI-enabled vertical SaaS for events and venues that skyrockets their revenues and accelerates their path to profitability!

name: Memory
description: Developer of a tracking software designed to track and manage time and work automatically. The company's application features automatic time tracking, project time management, and team time management which records work, groups it, suggests time entries, and offers suggestions, enabling clients to track their work efficiently while increasing sales and productivity.

name: Truly Experiences
description: Operator of an e-commerce platform designed to help in booking gift items that can be relived as memories by the person. The company's platform offers curated premium experiences including, a hand-picked collection of Michelin-starred tasting menus, city breaks, dining, tour and activities, and spa and pampering gifts for various occasions, enabling people to book a different and memorable experience gift or simply treat themselves.

name: Ubeya
description: Developer of a workforce management platform designed for businesses employing temporary workers as part of the gig economy. The company offers an employee application that manages employee networks and helps businesses to shorten communication cycles within their organization through a shared contacts list application, enabling business and agency leaders to optimize processes, scheduling, communication, payroll, and compliance.

name: Xwork
description: Operator of an online workspace search platform intended to find and rent a room according to users' needs. The company's platform allows users to book meeting rooms, event spaces, coworking spaces, office rooms, and virtual offices among others, enabling users to use and benefit from the spaces that meet their requirements.

name: Codec
description: Developer of content marketing intelligence platform. The company develops content marketing intelligence platform for business enterprises for analysis of the media consumption behaviours of target audience through social platforms, and generation of unique content recommendations.

name: Pongalo
description: Provider of digital media services. The company engages into the operation of Spanish-language digital rights of television and feature film content management.

name: JobPal
description: Developer of a job search application. The company develops an application which allows users to apply for jobs using their smartphones.

name: Swychd
description: Developer of a repayment platform for student debt. The company provides a personal finance platform that offers recommendations to users for repaying their student loans.

name: Fanbread
description: Provider of an advertising automation platform for creators and independent publishers. The company provides a platform for media brands to enable content creation, distribution and monetization.

name: Turnstyle
description: Turnstyle is a proximity based marketing tool for local retailers who offer their patrons free wifi. By exchanging Facebook login for free wifi, retailers can connect with people who have walked through their door in the future to boost future engagement.

name: Storemaven
description: Provider of an A/B testing platform designed to ascertain application store conversion rates. The company's platform can find the optimal combination of icon, description and screenshots to drive install conversion in the app stores, enabling application developers to gain insights on user behavior in the stores by tracking and analyzing over 10,000,000 data points.

name: MyLife
description: Provider of an emotional wellness platform designed to help the users find peace of mind everyday. The companies emotional wellness platform provides personalized approach prompts for users to check in with, and provides recommendations for short activities like meditations tuned to those particular emotions.

name: postcron
description: Developer of a tool designed to allow brands to build and run any kind of promotion. The company's tool allows companies to easily install raffles, image contests and a collection of more than 20 applications on their Fan Page, enabling agencies and marketers to attract more fans, increase interaction with their audience and boost the company's sales through From Facebook.

name: ONDiGO
description: Developer of customer relationship management platform designed to automatically sync a team's activity with Salesforce. The company's customer relationship management platform, ONDiGO, offers a mobile application that processes email, calendar, phone calls and text messages which reflect business interactions with preexisting customers in customer relationship management system and automatically builds a customer database from those interactions, enabling businesses to increase sales-productivity
